content:
I am currently a PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Iowa. I will be on the job-market during the 2021-2022 academic year. My research interests include econometrics and empirical industrial organization. In particular, I am interested in semi-parametric and non-parametric models with endogeneity, unobserved heterogeneity, and quantile regression. I am interested in applying these econometric techniques to the literature on firm productivity heterogeneity and auctions.
My job market paper applies nonparametric identification results to firm production functions where productivity has heterogeneous effects on output and input demand functions. My estimates suggest there is substantial variation across firms which corresponds to the rank in the distribution of output and input demand.

title: Justin Doty
